description: Implement a CLI that will allow the user to interact with the database. Provide functionality for

jobs that call the cli with the required commands. Also provide an interactive mode that lets the user interactively work on the database. If the user calls the cli with a database that does not exist, create the database file for them. The CLI will only be supported on desktop platforms. You can alter this codebase to use workspaces so that the CLI code is separate from the core database library.
